---
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
    page-layout: article
---

::: page-header
# LATEST NEWS
:::

::: {.news-container}
Our work titled **"Time-series Transformer Models For Predicting Transient Greenhouse Gas Emissions"** (Control/Tracking Number: 26ATCE-P-626-SPE), has been recently accepted for presentation at the upcoming Society of Petroleum Engineers Annual Technical Conference and Exhibition (SPE ATCE), taking place in Houston, Texas, USA, from October 21–23, 2026 ([www.atce.org](https://www.atce.org)). 

This is a joint effort by Varsha Dodda (Indian Institute of Technology Indore), A. Roy (Baker Hughes), and the D-cubed lab. This project focuses on cutting-edge predictive modeling to track and forecast greenhouse gas emissions, applying advanced transformer models to transient time-series.
:::


::: {.list-item-spaced} 
<iframe class="embed-container iframe-embed"
  src="https://www.linkedin.com/embed/feed/update/urn:li:ugcPost:7450423180051001344"
  title="Embedded post"></iframe>
:::


::: {.list-item-spaced} 
<iframe class="embed-container iframe-embed"
  src="https://www.linkedin.com/embed/feed/update/urn:li:share:7416848282158796803"
  title="Embedded post"></iframe>
:::


::: {.list-item-spaced} 
<iframe class="embed-container iframe-embed"
  src="https://www.linkedin.com/embed/feed/update/urn:li:share:7367156104704741376"
  title="Embedded post"></iframe>
:::


::: {.list-item-spaced}
<iframe class="embed-container iframe-embed"
  src="https://www.linkedin.com/embed/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7363068619066392576"
  title="LinkedIn post embed"></iframe>
:::


::: {.list-item-spaced}
<iframe class="embed-container iframe-embed"
  src="https://www.linkedin.com/embed/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7363049498551472129"
  title="LinkedIn post embed"></iframe>
:::


::: {.list-item-spaced}  
<iframe class="embed-container iframe-embed"
  src="https://www.linkedin.com/embed/feed/update/urn:li:share:7348144627666849793"
  title="LinkedIn post embed"></iframe>
:::

<iframe class="embed-container iframe-embed"
  src="https://www.linkedin.com/embed/feed/update/urn:li:share:7296608686058131456"
  title="LinkedIn post embed"></iframe>
:::

<iframe class="embed-container iframe-embed"
  src="https://www.linkedin.com/embed/feed/update/urn:li:share:7285353598190809088"
  title="LinkedIn post embed"></iframe>
:::

<iframe class="embed-container iframe-embed"
  src="https://www.linkedin.com/embed/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7271931663054438400"
  title="LinkedIn post embed"></iframe>
:::


::: {.list-item-spaced}  
<iframe class="embed-container iframe-embed"
  src="https://www.linkedin.com/embed/feed/update/urn:li:share:7267065814774607872"
  title="LinkedIn post embed"></iframe>
:::

<iframe class="embed-container iframe-embed"
  src="https://www.linkedin.com/embed/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7253263865034022913"
  title="LinkedIn post embed"></iframe>
:::

<iframe class="embed-container iframe-embed"
  src="https://www.linkedin.com/embed/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7252926208563167232"
  title="LinkedIn post embed"></iframe>
:::

<a href="home.qmd" class="btn-custom">Home →</a>
:::
